generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with adjustable current (I_M) input and torque (τ_M) output, interfaced with Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller for dynamic torque regulation within the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    base:isContainedIn MABIMAXFirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance GearboxActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox transforming rotational energy (τ_G → τ_out) with configurable gear ratios to achieve low-speed, high-torque output for precision machining tasks."
    base:isContainedIn MABIMAXFirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance CNCController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller enabling separate axis control with inputs for position, speed, or acceleration, and outputs for target/actual values of position, velocity, acceleration, and motor current."
    base:isContainedIn MABIMAXFirstAxisEnvironment
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Primary position encoder mounted directly on the motor shaft providing real-time angular position data (r_M) for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn MABIMAXFirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder positioned behind the gearbox providing real-time angular position data (r_G) to enable backlash reduction by comparing encoder readings."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn MABIMAXFirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current (I_M) for torque estimation via motor constants in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn MABIMAXFirstAxisEnvironment
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance AxisSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) and Internal Block Diagram (IBD) describing the structural composition of the MABI MAX 100 first axis including Motor, Gearbox, and Cycloidal Gearbox components."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalShadowEnvironment
]

instance MotorSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Component-specific simulation model (SimModel_M) for the permanent magnet synchronous motor dynamics in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalShadowEnvironment
]

instance GearwheelSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Component-specific simulation model (SimModel_GW) for the gearwheel dynamics in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalShadowEnvironment
]

instance GearboxSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Component-specific simulation model (SimModel_GB) for the cycloidal gearbox dynamics in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalShadowEnvironment
]

instance IdealGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Base simulation model (Fig. 4a) representing ideal gearbox behavior without friction for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalShadowEnvironment
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Coulomb-Viscous friction model (Fig. 4b) implemented in Simulink to subtract friction losses from simulated outputs for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalShadowEnvironment
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Stribeck friction model implemented in Simulink for dynamic friction compensation in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalShadowEnvironment
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Dahl friction model implemented in Simulink for dynamic friction compensation in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalShadowEnvironment
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable LuGre friction model implemented in Simulink for dynamic friction compensation in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalShadowEnvironment
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current (I_M) from the motor, transmitted via MQTT for torque estimation and friction modeling in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance MotorOutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor output angle (r_M) from the primary encoder, transmitted via MQTT for friction analysis in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance GearwheelOutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearwheel output angle (r_G) from the secondary encoder, transmitted via MQTT for backlash reduction in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance SystemOutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured system output angle (r_out) from the secondary encoder, transmitted via MQTT for motion accuracy analysis in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance FrictionCompensatedMotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated friction-compensated motor output angle (δr_M) derived from input current and friction models for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlOptimizationEnabler
]

instance FrictionCompensatedGearwheelAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated friction-compensated gearwheel output angle (δr_G) derived from motor dynamics and friction models for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearwheelOutputAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlOptimizationEnabler
]

instance FrictionCompensatedSystemAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated friction-compensated system output angle (δr_out) derived from gearbox dynamics and friction models for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SystemOutputAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlOptimizationEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque (τ_M) data computed from motor current (I_M) using manufacturer-provided dynamics models for friction analysis in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity (ω_M) data computed from motor inputs for friction analysis in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorOutputAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived acceleration (α_M) data computed from motor inputs for friction analysis in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorOutputAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT-based protocol for real-time sensor data streaming (input current, output angle) from the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller to the digital shadow for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataStreamingService
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tooling for structural and behavioral modeling of the MABI MAX 100 first axis components (Motor, Gearbox, Cycloidal Gearbox)."
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for executable friction and dynamics simulations (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre models) of the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelingService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) for semantic interoperability and metadata management of data traces and models in the MABI MAX 100 first axis digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables MetadataManagementService
]

instance DSRMProcessingFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom implementation of the Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) linking data traces, models, and sources with traceable computational steps for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataProcessingService
]

instance FrictionAnalysisEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom processing framework for real-time friction parameter identification using data-driven (black-box) and analytical (white-box) approaches in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance ControlOptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Integration framework for incorporating friction models into control algorithms via SysML/Simulink simulations for dynamic torque and velocity command adjustments in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelBasedControlOptimizationService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard platform for unified display of measured vs. simulated data traces (torque, angular velocity) enabling friction analysis and control tuning in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualAnalyticsService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeDataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MQTT-based real-time transmission of time-series data (I_M, r_out) from the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller to the digital shadow for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionInsight
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "SysML-based structural modeling of the MABI MAX 100 first axis components including Motor, Gearbox, and Cycloidal Gearbox with rotational/current energy flows."
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance FrictionModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executable friction modeling (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) in Simulink to subtract friction losses from simulated outputs for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelInsight
]

instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous derivation of static, kinetic, and viscous friction models using data-driven and analytical approaches to improve motion accuracy in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterUpdateAction
]

instance ModelBasedControlOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of friction models into control algorithms via SysML/Simulink simulations to adjust torque and velocity commands dynamically for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlStrategyRefinementAction
]

instance VisualAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified visualization dashboard providing comparative plots of measured vs. simulated data to validate friction models and guide manual adjustments in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance DataProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Traceable data processing framework linking data points (e.g., δr_M derivation from I_M and friction models) via DSRM computational steps for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTraceabilityInsight
]

instance MetadataManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for managing metadata and semantic interoperability of data traces and models in the MABI MAX 100 first axis digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:provides MetadataInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance DataTransmissionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time transmission of sensor data (I_M, r_out) via MQTT protocol from the physical twin to the digital shadow for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "SysML structural models (BDD/IBD) defining the composition and energy flows of the MABI MAX 100 first axis components."
]

instance FrictionModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Executable friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) implemented in Simulink for friction compensation in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
]

instance FrictionParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of friction coefficients (Coulomb friction, viscous damping) based on real-time sensor data to improve motion accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlStrategyRefinementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual or automated refinement of control algorithms based on torque/velocity deviations (r_out vs. δr_out) to optimize machining parameters."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparative plots of measured vs. simulated data traces (torque, angular velocity) enabling validation of friction models and manual adjustments."
]

instance DataTraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computational traceability of data points showing how derived values (e.g., δr_M) are computed from raw sensor inputs and friction models."
]

instance MetadataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Metadata management and semantic interoperability of data traces and models in the MABI MAX 100 first axis digital twin."
]

// C12: Environment
instance MABIMAXFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Operational environment for the MABI MAX 100 first vertical axis with restricted range [-90°, 90°] and maximum angular velocity |q̇_max| = 75°/s."
]

instance DigitalShadowEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital twin environment hosting the centralized single-instance digital shadow for the MABI MAX 100 first axis with integrated simulation models and data processing components."
]

instance MABIMAXSystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "The MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first vertical axis system under study for friction modeling and motion accuracy improvement."
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment MABIMAXFirstAxisEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment DigitalShadowEnvironment
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates on a **real-time, millisecond-scale synchronization** with the physical system:
  - **Sensor data acquisition**: Continuous streaming of encoder/motor current data at high frequency (implicitly assumed for precision control; exact frequency not specified but aligned with CNC controller refresh rates).
  - **Model updates**: Friction models are **continuously recalibrated** during operation to account for wear, temperature, or load changes, enabling **dynamic adaptation** to the PT’s state.
  - **Visualization refresh**: Dashboard updates in near-real-time to reflect live friction analysis and control adjustments."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is orchestrated as a **purpose-driven digital shadow** aligned with the **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)**. Key components include:
  - **Purpose**: Friction derivation for motion accuracy improvement in the first axis.
  - **Asset**: MABI MAX 100’s first axis (described via SysML SystemModel).
  - **Data Sources**: Physical sensors (encoders, current sensors) and virtual processing components (SimModel_M, SimModel_GW, SimModel_GB).
  - **Processing**: Simulation-based friction compensation using black-box/white-box models, with traceable data flows from input (I_M) to output (ˆr_out).
  - **Output**: Visualized deviations between measured (r_out) and simulated (ˆr_out) data for control adjustments. The constellation is **not bidirectional**; it does not modify the PT but enables informed decision-making for operators."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin covers the **as-operated phase** of the physical twin’s lifecycle, focusing on **real-time monitoring and adaptive control** during active machining tasks. It does not address:
  - **As-designed** (idealized) or **as-manufactured** phases, though structural models (SysML) may inform initial calibration.
  - **Post-operation analysis** (e.g., wear prediction) beyond immediate friction modeling for motion accuracy."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Model Validation**:
    - **Simulink simulations** validate friction models against measured data (e.g., comparing r_out vs. ˆr_out).
    - **Parameter tuning**: Manufacturer-provided dynamics models and motor constants ensure torque/velocity calculations align with physical behavior.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**:
    - **Encoder discrepancies** (motor vs. secondary encoder) are used to infer backlash and elasticity, improving friction model accuracy.
    - **Data trace provenance**: Each data point (e.g., ˆr_G) is traceable to its source (SimModel_GW) and processing steps (friction model subtraction).
  - **Verification Mechanisms**:
    - **Dashboard visualizations** allow manual validation of simulated vs. measured data for friction patterns.
    - **No explicit statistical validation** (e.g., confidence intervals) is mentioned, but the methodology emphasizes **real-time adaptability** over offline validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical system and digital shadow uses:
   - **MQTT protocol** for **real-time data streaming** of sensor data (input current, output angle, and derived quantities).
   - **Time-series data format**: Each data trace consists of **floating-point arrays** of torque (*τ*) and angular velocity (*ω*) values, timestamped for synchronization.
   - **No explicit network architecture details** (e.g., IP addressing, latency metrics) are provided beyond MQTT. The connection is **unidirectional** (PT → DS) with no return path."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is deployed within the **Laboratory for Machine Tools and Production Engineering (WZL), RWTH Aachen University**, using:
   - **Local infrastructure**: Hosted on lab equipment (unspecified server architecture) to support **real-time processing** and **dashboard visualization**.
   - **Executable components**: Simulink models and Processing components run on **local machines** connected to the robot via MQTT.
   - **Dashboard**: A **unified visualization tool** (implementation unspecified) displays data traces and friction analysis results in real-time."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to the following standards:
  - **SysML (Systems Modeling Language)**: For structural and behavioral modeling of the first axis (ISO/IEC 19512).
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)**: ISO/IEC 62424 for semantic interoperability and metadata management in industrial systems.
  - **MQTT (Message Queuing Telemetry Transport)**: OASIS standard (OASIS MQTT v5.0) for real-time data streaming.
  - **Simulink**: Proprietary tool but aligned with **model-based systems engineering (MBSE)** methodologies (e.g., RFLP, OOSEM) for multi-physics simulations."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The digital shadow’s **passive, one-way data flow** inherently enhances safety by:
   - **Preventing autonomous control**: No commands are sent back to the physical system, reducing risks of unintended operations.
   - **Isolated processing**: Data remains within the lab environment (WZL), with no mention of remote access or cybersecurity protocols (e.g., encryption, authentication). The **MQTT protocol** is assumed to follow standard security practices (e.g., TLS) if deployed in production, though this is not explicitly documented."
]
